fields.description: DocType that links to the Form Dialog target (e.g. child table).
fields.label: Child DocType

fields.description: Link field on the child DocType that points to the parent record.
fields.label: Link Field

fields.description: Label for the extra tab in the panel form dialog.

fields.label: Tab render JSON

fields.label: Portal field config
